tripAiPrompt.metaDescription: Generate a prompt with the trip data, send it to an AI and paste its JSON to create selected plans.
tripAiPrompt.title: Generate plans with an external AI
tripAiPrompt.description: Copy a prompt with destination, accommodation, dates and existing plans. Then paste the returned JSON and choose which plans to save.
tripAiPrompt.prompt.title: Prompt ready to copy
tripAiPrompt.prompt.helper: The text is updated with the real trip data and asks the AI for a JSON response compatible with TravelPlan.
tripAiPrompt.prompt.label: Generated prompt
tripAiPrompt.prompt.copyHelper: You can copy it or open ChatGPT with the prompt prefilled.
tripAiPrompt.prompt.copyFallback: The prompt could not be copied automatically. Select the text and copy it manually.
tripAiPrompt.import.title: Paste the AI JSON
tripAiPrompt.import.helper: Paste the JSON object returned by the AI. Objects with plans or a direct array of plans are accepted.
tripAiPrompt.import.label: JSON returned by the AI
tripAiPrompt.import.empty: When you paste the JSON, candidate plans will appear here for review.
tripAiPrompt.import.ready: Detected {count} candidate plans. Select the ones you want to save.
tripAiPrompt.error.invalidJson: The pasted text is not valid JSON.
tripAiPrompt.error.missingPlans: The JSON must be an array of plans or an object with a plans key.
tripAiPrompt.error.noValidPlans: No valid plan with a name was found in the JSON.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.title: Choose which plans to save
tripAiPrompt.candidates.empty: There are no candidates to select yet.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.saved: The selected plans have been saved to the trip.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.saveError: The selected plans could not be saved.
tripAiPrompt.candidates.noneSelected: Select at least one plan before saving.
